LanguageData.Lucky38_MakeSpices.description: Blend broc flower and carrot flower into a preserved seasoning mix fit for Lucky 38 kitchens.
LanguageData.Lucky38_MakeSpices.label: make spices
LanguageData.Lucky38_MakeSyrup.description: Render down maize or xander root into a thick preserved syrup suited for Lucky 38 desserts and bar stock.
LanguageData.Lucky38_MakeSyrup.label: make syrup
LanguageData.Lucky38_MakeSyrupFromCarrot.description: Render down carrots into a thick preserved syrup suited for Lucky 38 desserts and bar stock.
LanguageData.Lucky38_MakeSyrupFromCarrot.label: make syrup from carrot
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigarettes.description: Roll coyote tobacco chew into cigarettes.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigars.description: Roll coyote tobacco chew into cigars with a bit of gold trim for a more refined smoke.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailFine.description: Make a fine atomic cocktail, mixed precisely from multiple ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailFine.label: make fine atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailGourmet.description: Make a gourmet atomic cocktail where every factor has been calculated for maximum flavor and body.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailGourmet.label: make gourmet atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailLavish.description: Make a lavish atomic cocktail mixed from a wide variety of ingredients and chilled to perfection before serving.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailLavish.label: make lavish atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailSimple.description: Make a simple atomic cocktail quickly mixed from a duo of ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailSimple.label: make simple atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEnergyDrink.description: Make guarana by fortifying homebrew sarsaparilla with caffeine and a radioactive kick. It delivers fast energy and a later crash.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEnergyDrink.label: make guarana
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrup.description: Make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup by reducing fruit juice and sweetener into a thick bottling concentrate.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrup.label: make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrupBulk.description: Make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup by mixing natural fruit juice with sugar or preserved syrup. This recipe is much more efficient.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrupBulk.label: make homebrew sarsaparilla syrup (efficient)
LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.description: Create hot sauce from peppers or jalapenos. It keeps the same throat-burning kick while fitting the Lucky 38 pantry better.
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.description: Create ketchup from tomatoes or tatos. A thick sauce with the same sweet tang Lucky 38 diners expect from the pre-war original.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.description: Create brahmin shroom butter from milk and smokeleaf. Rich, fatty, and wildly irresponsible, it is the sort of condiment only a place like the Lucky 38 would serve on purpose.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.label: make brahmin shroom butter
LanguageData.VCE_WasabiPaste.label: make xander root paste
